hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); exit(0) if 'mitamae' not in cmd else (exit(0) if '--dry-run' in cmd else (print('ERROR: mitamae without --dry-run is blocked. Add --dry-run flag.',file=sys.stderr) or exit(2)))"

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); path=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print('Reminder: test cookbook changes with ./bin/mitamae local linux.rb --dry-run') if '/cookbooks/' in path and path.endswith('.rb') else None"
